subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Kindle thou a flame upon that brazier, that the sweet fragrance of aloes and ambergris may perfume the senses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل باتش محبت الله شعله ای در آن مجمر زن تا بوی خوش عود و عنبر مشام سکان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation
